data.content: Plan complete for searchable model selection. All implementation stays within scripts/setup.sh (self-contained, no external deps). Uses submit-then-filter pattern: threshold-based dispatch (>15 models triggers search), _filter_models() for case-insensitive substring matching via tr+case glob, _collect_models_searchable() for the interactive loop with count display and re-search. Preserves "Other (type manually)" fallback. Tests: Vitest unit test for _filter_models in src/lib/__tests__/setup-model-filter.test.ts, PTY smoke test extension with mocked opencode producing 20+ models. Small-list behavior unchanged (no regression).
